positive_examples: Can you pack this repo into a context bundle for me?
I need a repo context export to share with the other reviewer.
Give me a context pack of the src directory before I paste it into the other session.
negative_examples: Can you rename this variable to camelCase?

rollback.method: Remove "repo-context" from every profiles/*.json skills array, then delete skills/repo-context/. The skill has no side effects beyond writing an explicitly-named output bundle file on demand, so no state migration is needed.
